Motor Yacht

Accura Luxury 39 Motor Yacht

Elegant and efficient, perfect for intimate gatherings

Book This Yacht
About This Yacht

The Accura 39 offers a refined yachting experience for smaller groups, combining comfort with maneuverability.

The Accura Luxury 39 Motor Yacht is ideal for intimate groups seeking a premium yachting experience. With its sleek design and comprehensive amenities, this yacht delivers comfort and style for memorable Bali sea days.

Day CharterUp to 8 persons

Technical Specifications

Type
Mono hull speed boat
Length
12 meter
Width
2.6 meter
Engine
4 Stroke, 250 x 2 Yamaha
Fuel Capacity
1,400 liters
Water Capacity
500 liters
Navigation
Skymarine

Onboard Facilities

  • 1x Toilet with shower
  • 1x Berth
  • Sound System
  • WiFi
  • Air Conditioning
  • Snorkeling Equipment
  • Fishing Tools

Available Activities

  • Snorkeling
  • Fishing
  • Diving (optional)

Safety Equipment

  • Sea Safe Tracking
  • Life Craft
  • Life Jackets
  • Insurance covered by Jasa Raharja Putra

Pricing

Nusa Dua 4hrs: Rp 15,000,000 | Nusa Penida/Lembongan 8hrs: Rp 24,000,000

What's Included

  • Towels
  • Snorkeling accessories
  • Fishing equipment
  • Water
  • tea
  • coffee and non-alcoholic drinks

Optional Extras

  • Transfer
  • Diving accessories
  • Surfing accessories
  • Restaurant lunch at island
  • Professional photographer
  • DJ with equipment
  • Alcoholic drinks
  • Fresh fruits & snacks

Payment Policy

50% deposit required. Full payment before trip. IDR currencies only.

Cancellation Policy

Low season: 50% within 7 days | High season: 50% within 30 days | Within 7 days: 100% | Weather: 25%
